title: parageum montanum
intro: Parageum montanum, also known as the Mountain Sage or Parageum, is a plant species native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. It possesses medicinal properties, particularly due to its essential oils, which contain compounds like thujone and borneol. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, inflammation, and respiratory issues, thanks to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Parageum montanum can be used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its health benefits.
